title: A Trip to Infinity
synopsisParagraphs: Does infinity exist? Can we experience the Infinite? In an animated film (created by artists from 10 countries) the world's most cutting-edge scientists and mathematicians go in search of the infinite and its mind-bending implications for the universe.
A Trip to Infinity made the Netflix Top 10 list in 32 countries and a 4 1/2 minute scene went viral on TikTok with 18 million views in a week.
rawText:
A TRIP TO INFINITY
Does infinity exist? Can we experience the Infinite? In an animated film (created by artists from 10 countries) the world's most cutting-edge scientists and mathematicians go in search of the infinite and its mind-bending implications for the universe.
A Trip to Infinity made the Netflix Top 10 list in 32 countries and a 4 1/2 minute scene went viral on TikTok with 18 million views in a week.

title: A Year in Space
synopsisParagraphs: Follow astronaut Scott Kelly’s record-breaking 12-month mission on the International Space Station, from launch to landing, as NASA charts the effects of long-duration spaceflight. A Year In Space is the story of life moving at the 17,500 miles per hour, of the human urge – the need – to explore no matter the cost or consequences.

title: Beyond A Year in Space
synopsisParagraphs: The journey into Deep Space will be one of humanity’s greatest scientific achievements and it will only be accomplished through a series of bold steps. Scott Kelly’s Year in Space was one of those. Now a new generation of astronauts is training to take the next ones. Jessica Meir and Victor Glover are in line to be among the few human beings to venture out of Earth orbit – this time beyond the moon, into deep space and possibly to Mars.
rawText:
BEYOND A YEAR IN SPACE
The journey into Deep Space will be one of humanity’s greatest scientific achievements and it will only be accomplished through a series of bold steps. Scott Kelly’s Year in Space was one of those. title: Buried in Burma
synopsisParagraphs: Buried in Burma is the story of a British potato farmer's quixotic quest to dig up a squadron of Spitfire aircraft he believes were buried at the end of WWII. When an improbable partner steps forward to offer help, the journey becomes a farce where shovels and spades unearth delusion and deceit.

title: Dr. Tony Fauci
synopsisParagraphs: Follow Dr. Anthony Fauci as he grapples with the COVID-19 pandemic and his 50-year career as the nation’s leading public health advocate. American Masters: Dr. Tony Fauci reveals a rarely seen side of the physician, husband and father as he confronts political backlash, a new administration and questions of the future.

title: Faces of Death
synopsisParagraphs: A Tattoo To Remember
Pausing Death
attributionLines: Today, our attitudes towards death are changing. And the choices we make for ourselves after we die have become yet another way to express our individuality. A mortician who believes in the healing power of embalming… a young woman who has chosen a tattoo made from ink containing her father’s to ashes... a company who will help you postpone death by freezing you… a family who is digging their father’s grave before he has died... Faces of Death tells the stories of people who've found a way to accept death as a natural part of being alive.
The entire episode may be seen at NationalGeographic.com
rawText:
An Embalmer's Tale
A Tattoo To Remember
Pausing Death
FACES OF DEATH
Today, our attitudes towards death are changing. And the choices we make for ourselves after we die have become yet another way to express our individuality. A mortician who believes in the healing power of embalming… a young woman who has chosen a tattoo made from ink containing her father’s to ashes... a company who will help you postpone death by freezing you… a family who is digging their father’s grave before he has died... Faces of Death tells the stories of people who've found a way to accept death as a natural part of being alive.
The entire episode may be seen at NationalGeographic.com
Produced & Written by
MARK MANNUCCI & ANNA BOWERS
Directed by MARK MANNUCCI
Producer JON HALPERIN
National Geographic Channel
© National Geographic Television

title: Headspace Guide to Meditation
synopsisParagraphs: It's time to be kind to your mind. In partnership with Headspace, this 8-episode Netflix series shows how meditation can help in your daily life. From tackling stress to embracing gratitude, each episode first teaches the basics and techniques of the practice, and then concludes with a guided meditation. Push play, close your eyes, and explore the many benefits of meditation.

title: I Contain Multitudes
synopsisParagraphs: Ed Yong, author of the New York Times bestseller I Contain Multitudes, has teamed up with HHMI Tangled Banks Studios for a series that explores the strange, wondrous, and vital realm of the microscopic. Meet scientists and the microbes that captivate them. Watch fascinating animal behavior that makes sense only in light of a microbial backstory. Discover how the living world that we see is shaped by an invisible world.
Our embrace of microbes, and theirs of us, is a pillar of life on Earth.
rawText:
I CONTAIN MULTITUDES
Ed Yong, author of the New York Times bestseller I Contain Multitudes, has teamed up with HHMI Tangled Banks Studios for a series that explores the strange, wondrous, and vital realm of the microscopic. Meet scientists and the microbes that captivate them. Watch fascinating animal behavior that makes sense only in light of a microbial backstory. Discover how the living world that we see is shaped by an invisible world.
Our embrace of microbes, and theirs of us, is a pillar of life on Earth.
Directors, Writers & Executive Producers
JONATHAN HALPERIN & MARK MANNUCCI
Watch the full series online on Youtube .

title: The Day the '60s Died
synopsisParagraphs: The Day the '60s Died chronicles May 1970, the month in which four students were shot dead at Kent State. The mayhem that followed has been called the most divisive moment in American history since the Civil War. The Los Angeles Times wrote about the film: “Let[s] you taste the urgency of the moment.” Variety : “First rate...talks to all the right people.” The Cleveland Plain Dealer : “Brilliant job of bringing that violent, war-torn time into clear historical focus.” The New York Review of Books : “This is a remarkable film, with its parallel portraits of two sets of young Americans misused by the country’s leaders.”

title: Times Square Time Machine
synopsisParagraphs: You’re sitting just off of Times Square in midtown Manhattan in 2015 – but what are you sitting on top of? Zooming back a million years to look at the evolution of this little patch of land, this film offers an awe-inspiring view of the speed and ferocity with which humans have utterly transformed the globe.
attributionLines: A co-production of TED and ITVS in partnership with PBS.
